description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in modern, urban athletic wear. He wears a high-collared, fitted sweatshirt and jogger-style pants with dynamic paneling and graphic accents. His shoes are sporty and streamlined, suitable for walking or running in an urban environment. The figure's face is partially covered by a high collar or mask, and he has a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle styled upward. The overall appearance is contemporary and stylish, with a focus on comfort and mobility. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing an active and youthful look.
description: A modern adult male pedestrian in fitted athletic wear with a high-collared sweatshirt, jogger pants, and sporty shoes, featuring a distinctive upward-styled hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-collared sweatshirt, graphic jogger pants, and the full hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the high collar, the fit of the clothing, and the shoe design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweatshirt, pants, and shoes, as well as the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face covering, clothing fit, and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted high-collared sweatshirt and jogger-style athletic pants with graphic accents
